content.text:
`вҳ… Insight в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ`
The plan separates **exploration** (`playground`) from **production** (`frontend-design`) deliberately вҖ” a playground's job is to be cheap to throw away, so you commit to nothing until the UX direction feels right. The downloader phases trail the UI phases because enriched metadata (mod names, categories) from the browser work feeds directly into better file naming in the Python script. This is a data-dependency, not just a sequencing preference.
`в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ`

Plan written to `/Users/steven/CoX-mod-Adventure/PLAN/ROADMAP.md`. Here's the shape of it:

**Phase 0 вҖ” Brainstorm** (`brainstorming` skill): nail the data shape and UX questions before touching any code.

**Phase 1a вҖ” Playground** (`playground` skill): a self-contained `mod-browser-playground.html` with mock data вҖ” filter, sort, search, card density controls. Disposable. Fast.

**Phase 1b вҖ” Production browser** (`frontend-design` skill): the real thing, built with a mission-briefing-terminal aesthetic drawing on CoH's late-90s superhero comic UI chrome.

**Phase 2 вҖ” Downloader** (`python-expert` agent): retry logic, progress bar, resume on partial downloads, category subfolders, zip integrity checks, `--dry-run` and `--install` flags.

**Phase 3 вҖ” QA** (`dogfood` skill): exercise every interactive path, log findings to `PLAN/dogfood-findings.md`.

**Phase 4 (stretch)** вҖ” `mods.json` as a shared data source wiring everything together.

Ready to kick off Phase 0 brainstorming whenever you are.

result: Created `/Users/steven/CoX-mod-Adventure/PLAN/ROADMAP.md` вҖ” a loose 4-phase roadmap mapping brainstorming вҶ’ playground вҶ’ frontend-design вҶ’ python-expert downloader вҶ’ dogfood QA, grounded in the existing project structure.
